features: WIRED EARPHONES - With a comfortable fit and metal casing, the Groov-e Smart Buds are a stylish set of earphones that offer you an enhanced audio experience when listening to music or on the phone. Includes spare earbuds. Available in 3 colours

CLEAR STEREO SOUND - This in-ear headphone comes with a set of 10mm drivers to provide clear and crisp sounds for all audio, from listening to your favourite playlist to engaging in a conversation during a phone call

3.5MM GOLD PLUG - Each set of earphones utilises a 3.5mm audio jack for a direct connection to provide an uninterrupted stream of quality sound to compatible devices with an aux-in port such as select smartphones, tablets, and laptops

IN-LINE CONTROL - Take control of your music with the press of a button with the in-line remote that also features a built-in mic that lets you enjoy hands-free calling and enables the use of compatible voice assistants

ANTI-TANGLE CABLE - The Smart Buds feature a 1.2m flat cable designed to prevent your earphones from tangling and creating a mess while providing enough cable length for you to comfortably connect to your device
High quality stereo sound earphones with remote mic
Mic button answers calls, provides music playback and pause operation
description: From the manufacturer Designed for music lovers who don't sacrifice sound for style, Groov-e Smart Buds Metal Earphones deliver superior stereo sound in an ultra-lightweight package. Groov-e Smart Buds Metal Earphones with Remote Mic let you take your music with you wherever you go. The earphones feature high-quality stereo sound and a remote mic for hands-free calling or music playback. Plus, the 3 size earphone buds include extra tips for a perfect fit. The 10mm driver units deliver rich sounds that will fill any room, and the gold-plated 3.5mm plug ensures durability and excellent sound quality. Comfortable Fit Comfortable in-ear design make these earphones great for listening to music while relaxing. Mic Button Mic button answers calls, provides music playback and pause operation 10 mm Drivers 10 mm drivers providing clear sound for audio & phone coversation Anti Tangle Cable 1.2m cable features a flat ant-tangle system to stop your earphones getting into mess Why choose us! To build a brand that will provide consistent quality, desirability and great value all under one easily recognizable name Package Contains 1 x Groov-e GV-EB10-BE Smart Buds Metal Earphones with Remote Mic - Blue Earphone Buds - 3 Sizes
